days.title: Arrival in Test
days.subtitle: Exploring the gems of Test

timeline.title: Arrive at Test Train Station
timeline.detail: You will arrive at Test Train Station in the morning. Make sure to grab a local map and get your bearings. The city is known for its vibrant culture and historical sites.

timeline.title: Check in to Hotel Test Central
timeline.detail: Check in to this charming hotel located only a few minutes away from the station. The hotel offers comfortable accommodations and is well-rated by visitors.

timeline.title: Lunch at Cafe Test
timeline.detail: Enjoy a delicious lunch at Cafe Test, known for its local specialties. Try the signature dish of Test, made with fresh ingredients sourced from local markets.

timeline.title: Visit the Test Museum
timeline.detail: Explore the fascinating exhibitions at the Test Museum, which showcases the city's rich history and culture. Don't miss the interactive displays which are fun for all ages.

timeline.title: Stroll in Central Park Test
timeline.detail: Take a leisurely stroll in Central Park Test, a beautiful urban park filled with lush greenery and serene walking paths. Perfect for unwinding after a busy morning.

timeline.title: Dinner at Bistro Test
timeline.detail: Savor a delightful dinner at Bistro Test. The menu features seasonal dishes and local wines. The outdoor seating area is perfect for dining under the stars.

localTips: Purchase a city transport pass for easy travel around Test.
Consider booking a guided city tour for a deeper dive into Test's history.
Try to catch the sunset view from Central Park Test.

days.title: Exploring More of Test
days.subtitle: Further adventures in Test

timeline.title: Breakfast at Hotel Test Central
timeline.detail: Start your day with a hearty breakfast at the hotel. Enjoy various options including local pastries and fresh coffee to fuel your day's adventures.

timeline.title: Visit the Riverside Embankment
timeline.detail: Take a morning walk along the Riverside Embankment, offering scenic views of the waterfront and the city skyline. Ideal for photographs and enjoying the sunrise.

timeline.title: Lunch at Riverside Grill
timeline.detail: Dine at Riverside Grill, famous for its grilled specialties. Their outdoor seating provides a great view of the river while dining.

timeline.title: Test Botanical Gardens
timeline.detail: Explore the Test Botanical Gardens, home to diverse flora from around the world. Take a self-guided tour or join a guided group for more insight.

timeline.title: Shopping in Test Market Square
timeline.detail: Visit the bustling Test Market Square, filled with shops selling local crafts, souvenirs, and culinary delights. Perfect for picking up gifts.

timeline.title: Dinner at Local Kitchen
timeline.detail: End your trip with dinner at Local Kitchen, known for its homestyle cooking and inviting atmosphere. Try a local favorite dish of the region.

localTips: Check local listings for festivals or events happening during your stay.
Bargain in local shops — it's a common practice here.
Be mindful of closing times for different attractions.

hotels.name: Hotel Test Central
hotels.note: Located 5 minutes from Test Train Station.

budget.note: Homestyle meal to finish the trip
City transport passes for ease of travel
Entry fee for exploring the gardens

urgent.label: Book dinner reservations at Bistro Test
urgent.note: Highly recommended to reserve in advance
